title: Forms Engine Dependency Hardening
objective: Harden the already-imported forms-engine package in the platform root by verifying declared dependencies, running representative generator smoke tests, and documenting the smallest remaining runtime gaps without expanding the approved import scope.
required_inputs: configured local Python environment for the platform workspace
constrained_outputs: Dependency/runtime hardening updates limited to packages/forms-engine and closely related package notes or smoke harnesses
No app-shell build-out, no broad template import, no database integration
validation_steps: Confirm work stays within the existing forms-engine package boundary rather than widening the import scope
Confirm declared runtime dependencies are sufficient for representative generator execution or explicitly report the remaining dependency blockers
Confirm smoke-test results distinguish successful generator validation from later deferred forms-domain work
Confirm apps/forms-studio, broad templates, and forms-domain database/service contracts remain out of scope
sql_permission_note: This packet is limited to package dependency/runtime hardening. It does not authorize forms-domain schema or database work.
